meta.title: Our Story | Bontera
meta.description: Discover Bontera’s origin, evolution, and vision. From 2004 to today, a journey driven by excellence, safety, and sustainability.

hero.title: A legacy that turns ambitions into reality
hero.subtitle: With more than 20 years of expertise in construction and project development, we guide our clients at every step with transparency, efficiency, and reliability.

origin.title: Where it all began
origin.paragraph1: Bontera was born from a simple conviction: build with rigor, transparency, and technical mastery to deliver reliable and durable projects.
origin.paragraph2: From the start, we structured our approach around safety, compliance with standards, and rigorous management of costs and timelines.
origin.paragraph3: Over the years, our expertise expanded to more complex projects, with a growing focus on energy performance and responsible construction practices.

founderQuote.quote: Our objective is clear: to offer our partners and clients real estate projects that are reliable, safe, and high value-added.

founderQuote.title: Founder & CEO

pandemic.title: Resilience in a critical period

future.title: Future vision
future.paragraph1: Our priority is to deliver projects that are ever more high-performing, safer, and more sustainable, without compromising on quality.
future.paragraph2: We invest in the methods, talent, and partnerships needed to remain a benchmark player in our markets.

meta.title: Legal notice, privacy, cookies and FAQ | Bontera
meta.description: View our legal information, privacy policy, cookie policy, and frequently asked questions.

hero.title: Privacy policy
hero.subtitle: Everything you need to know about site usage, data management, and frequently asked questions, all in one place.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.body: Bontera respects your privacy. We only collect the information necessary to respond to your requests (form, email, phone) and improve the site experience. We do not sell your data. For any questions or requests regarding your data, contact us at info@bontera.de.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.body: By using this site, you agree to browse it for lawful purposes and not disrupt its operation. The content (texts, images, graphic elements) is protected and may not be reused without authorization. The information presented is provided for informational purposes and may change.

cookies.title: Cookie policy
cookies.body: We use cookies and similar technologies to ensure the site functions properly, measure audience, and improve performance. You can manage your preferences via your browser settings. Some features may be limited if cookies are disabled.

faqBlock.title: Frequently asked questions (FAQ)
faqBlock.subtitle: Find answers here to the most common questions about our projects, timelines, and process.

meta.title: About | Bontera GmbH
meta.description: Discover Bontera’s 20+ years of excellence in construction, project development, and real estate brokerage. Safety, quality, and transparency.

hero.title: Construction excellence since 2004
hero.subtitle: With more than 20 years of expertise in construction and project development, we guide our clients at every step with transparency, efficiency, and reliability.

story.title: A legacy that turns ambitions into reality
story.paragraph1: With more than 20 years of experience in construction and project development, we support our clients at every stage of their projects, from design to final delivery, placing paramount importance on safety, execution quality, and compliance with standards.
story.paragraph2: Thanks to our technical expertise and our knowledge of the real estate market, we offer reliable, durable solutions tailored to each client’s needs. Our commitment is built on essential values: professionalism, rigor, and trust.
story.paragraph3: Aware of environmental challenges, we integrate eco-responsible solutions, quality materials, and construction methods that respect the environment. Each project is designed to combine energy performance, durability, and comfort.
story.founderQuote: Our objective is clear: to offer our partners and clients real estate projects that are reliable, safe, and high value-added.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: We create sustainable, safe, and economically viable solutions for private clients, investors, and businesses. To do so, we combine deep market knowledge, transparent advice, and a strong network of financial and real estate partners.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.description: To be the trusted partner for construction and real estate in Europe, recognized for projects that combine quality, sustainability, and long-term value creation.

values.title: Our core values
values.subtitle: These principles guide every one of our decisions and every one of our projects.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: We guarantee our clients full visibility into every aspect of their projects.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.description: We honor our commitments with rigorous cost management and on-time delivery.

expertise.title: Technical expertise
expertise.description: Our deep technical knowledge and integrated project management ensure continuous improvement across all phases of construction.

integrated.title: Integrated approach
integrated.description: We offer a complete solution combining construction and sales, providing a seamless service from design to delivery.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: We integrate eco-responsible solutions, quality materials, and construction methods that respect the environment.

valueCreation.title: Value creation
valueCreation.description: We focus on increasing value, minimizing risk, and ensuring long-term stability for all our clients and partners.

founding.title: The beginning
founding.description: Bontera was founded with a vision: revolutionize construction through innovation and an unwavering commitment to quality.

expansion.title: Regional expansion
expansion.description: Deployment of operations in the Middle East, key partnerships, and delivery of our first major commercial project.

international.title: International expansion
international.description: Entry into European and Asian markets, with the opening of offices in 5 new countries.

sustainability.title: Sustainable leadership
sustainability.description: Launch of our sustainability initiative, obtaining LEED certification and committing to carbon neutrality by 2030.

digital.title: Digital transformation
digital.description: Implementation of advanced BIM and AI-driven project management, transforming our processes.

future.title: Building tomorrow
future.description: Continued innovation with smart building technologies and expansion of our sustainable portfolio worldwide.

leadership.title: Meet our leaders
leadership.subtitle: Experienced professionals who carry Bontera’s vision of excellence.

certifications.title: Certifications & accreditations
certifications.description: Our commitment to excellence is confirmed by internationally recognized certifications and industry accreditations that guarantee the highest standards of quality, safety, and environmental responsibility.

global.title: Building beyond borders
global.description: From Germany’s skylines to Italy’s historic streets, Bontera’s expertise spans multiple countries. Our European presence enables us to bring leading construction capabilities anywhere.

cta.title: Ready to build something exceptional
cta.description: Whether you are planning a residential or commercial development or a sustainable building, our team is ready to bring your vision to life.

meta.title: Our services | Bontera Construction
meta.description: Discover Bontera’s complete services: commercial, residential, infrastructure, industrial, renovation, and consulting.

hero.title: End-to-end construction solutions
hero.subtitle: From idea to delivery, we provide construction services tailored to your vision and requirements.

overview.title: Excellence in every sector
overview.description: With more than 20 years of experience, Bontera has developed deep expertise across a wide range of sectors. Our integrated approach combines innovative design, precision engineering, and sustainable practices to deliver projects that exceed expectations.

mainServices.title: What we offer
mainServices.subtitle: Comprehensive services to bring your vision to life.

commercial.title: Construction
commercial.heroDescription: We deliver construction projects of all sizes, from design to handover. Our method ensures execution quality, compliance with standards, on-time delivery, and budget control, with a sustainable focus on performance and comfort.
commercial.description: We build houses, buildings, commercial spaces, and warehouses with full support and rigorous execution. Each project is managed to reduce surprises, optimize costs, and deliver a durable, high-performing asset that creates long-term value.

realEstate.title: Real Estate Development & Brokerage
realEstate.description: We develop and support residential, commercial, and mixed-use real estate projects, while also providing brokerage services for buying, selling, and leasing. Our approach combines market expertise, technical control, and total transparency to secure every step and maximize asset value.

brokerage.title: Real estate brokerage: Buying, Selling & Leasing
brokerage.description:
We support our clients in their buying, selling, and leasing transactions, leveraging our market expertise.

Thanks to our network of professionals and our personalized approach, we help you make the best decisions and secure your transactions. We defend your interests at every step to optimize the value of your assets and close deals under the best conditions.

Our commitment is built on total transparency and consistent advocacy for our clients’ interests.

real-estate.title: Project development
real-estate.heroDescription: We manage the development of residential, commercial, and mixed-use real estate projects with a structured and transparent approach. From feasibility study to delivery, we secure every stage, control risks, and optimize the value of your assets.
real-estate.description: We support your real estate projects end-to-end by combining market expertise, technical mastery, and rigorous coordination. Our goal: secure your decisions, reduce surprises, and maximize the performance of your investments.

brokerage.title: Real estate brokerage
brokerage.description:
We support you in buying, selling, and leasing with deep market knowledge and a clear negotiation strategy.

Thanks to our network and a personalized approach, we identify the best opportunities, secure the key steps, and defend your interests through to signing.

Our commitment: transparency, responsiveness, and measurable results.

residential.title: Residential construction
residential.description: We create living spaces where families thrive, from luxury residences to sustainable developments that define contemporary housing.

industrial.title: Industrial construction
industrial.description: Design and delivery of industrial sites optimized for operational efficiency and the demands of modern production.

renovation.title: Renovation & restoration
renovation.heroDescription: Bring your spaces back to life without betraying their identity. We manage your renovations and restorations with precision, combining traditional techniques and modern solutions to improve comfort, safety, energy performance, and heritage value.
renovation.description: We renovate residential and commercial properties and restore listed buildings, respecting architectural identity, applicable standards, and the site’s technical constraints. Our approach combines traditional know-how and modern solutions to improve functionality, safety, energy performance, and durability. From diagnosis to finishes, we ensure rigorous execution, controlled quality, and a result faithful to the spirit of the place, while delivering lasting value to your heritage.

consulting.title: Consulting
consulting.heroDescription: Expert support at every phase: feasibility, cost estimation, risk analysis, and regulatory compliance.
consulting.description: We provide construction consulting services for individuals and businesses looking to secure their technical and financial decisions. As the representative of a public or private project owner, we act as a single point of contact, defending the client’s interests.

management.title: Project Management
management.heroDescription: We provide a turnkey project management service for individuals and businesses looking to secure their real estate investments. As a single point of contact, we coordinate all project stakeholders: architects, engineering firms, contractors, and suppliers. Our mission is to ensure optimal control of costs, timelines, and quality, while offering full transparency at every stage of the project
management.description: From initial planning to final handover, we provide structured, transparent, results-driven project management. We define objectives, set a realistic schedule, coordinate stakeholders, and monitor execution daily to prevent drift. Our team manages the budget, anticipates risks, resolves blockers quickly, and implements continuous quality control. Result: a controlled site, clear communication, and a delivery aligned with technical requirements and client expectations.

sustainability.title: Sustainable Construction
sustainability.description: We are committed to environmentally responsible construction practices. From guidance toward LEED certification to energy-efficient design and sourcing sustainable materials, we help you build for the future.

process.title: A proven process
process.subtitle: A structured approach that ensures quality, efficiency, and transparency at every stage.

discovery.title: Discovery & planning
discovery.description: We start by understanding your vision, requirements, and constraints in order to establish a comprehensive plan.

planning.title: Design & engineering
planning.description: Our teams develop detailed plans and precise engineering to bring your project to life.

execution.title: Construction & execution
execution.description: On-site expertise and advanced technologies for exemplary build quality.

delivery.title: Handover & support
delivery.description: Testing, handover, and ongoing support to ensure your satisfaction.

industries.title: Multi-sector expertise
industries.description: Our portfolio spans industries with specific requirements, demanding deep expertise and tailored solutions.

technology.title: Building with tomorrow’s technologies
technology.description: We leverage cutting-edge technologies to improve efficiency, enhance quality, and deliver better outcomes.

bim.title: BIM technology
bim.description: BIM to plan, coordinate, and visualize accurately throughout the project lifecycle.

drones.title: Drone surveys
drones.description: Aerial surveys and real-time monitoring for accurate site assessment and progress tracking.

prefab.title: Prefabrication
prefab.description: Off-site manufacturing of components for faster, more efficient construction and higher quality.

iot.title: IoT & smart buildings
iot.description: Connected systems and sensors for intelligent management and improved operational performance.

cta.title: Ready to start your project
cta.description: Let’s see how Bontera can bring your vision to life with complete solutions.

meta.description: Contact Bontera Construction. Visit our offices in Dubai, Riyadh, Cairo and London, or send us a message to discuss your project.

hero.title: Let’s build something great together
hero.subtitle: You have a project in mind. Our team is ready to help you bring it to life. Contact us through one of the channels below.

form.title: How can we help
form.description: Fill out the form below and our team will get back to you within 24 hours.

message.label: Your message
message.placeholder: Tell us about your project, your requirements, your timeline, and anything that helps us understand your needs...

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
errors.messageTooShort: Your message must be at least 20 characters

privacy.text: By submitting this form, you agree to our

success.title: Message sent
success.message: Thank you for contacting us. Our team will review your message and respond within 24 hours.

error.title: An error occurred
error.message: We could not send your message. Please try again or contact us directly by phone or email.

responseTime.title: Fast response guaranteed
responseTime.description: Our team typically responds within 24 hours on business days. For urgent matters, use the emergency line.

offices.title: Visit our offices
offices.description: With offices in the Middle East and Europe, we are always close to your project.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Quick answers to common questions about working with Bontera.

timeline.question: How long does a construction project take
timeline.answer: Timelines vary depending on scope and complexity. A small commercial renovation may take 3 to 6 months, while a large-scale development can span 2 to 3 years. During the initial consultation, we provide a detailed schedule tailored to your project.

budget.question: How do you manage budgets and cost estimates
budget.answer: We provide transparent, detailed estimates during planning. We use advanced tools and historical data to ensure accuracy. We also offer value engineering options to optimize costs without compromising quality.

process.question: What is your project management process
process.answer: Our 4-phase process includes: Discovery & planning, Design & engineering, Construction & execution, Handover & support. Each phase has clear milestones, and you have a dedicated project manager as your single point of contact.

warranty.question: What warranties do you offer
warranty.answer: We offer comprehensive warranties: 10 years on structural elements, 5 years on mechanical and electrical systems, and 2 years on workmanship. Extended warranty options are also available.

hero.title: Build your future with us
hero.subtitle: Join a team of passionate professionals shaping skylines and building communities worldwide. Your next opportunity is waiting.

whyJoin.title: Why build your career here
whyJoin.description: At Bontera, we believe our people are our greatest asset. We are committed to creating an environment where talent thrives, innovation advances, and everyone can reach their full potential.

impact.title: Real impact
impact.description: Work on landmark projects that transform communities and leave a lasting legacy.

growth.title: Continuous development
growth.description: Access world-class training, mentorship, and clear career paths.

team.description: Join a diverse, supportive team that celebrates success together.

retirement.title: Retirement
retirement.description: Competitive retirement savings plans with company contribution.

learning.title: Learning & development

vacation.title: Generous time off
vacation.description: Flexible time-off policy and paid holidays.

flexibility.title: Flexibility
flexibility.description: Flexible work arrangements and remote work possible

growth.title: Career growth
growth.description: Clear pathways, mentorship, and advancement opportunities within our global operations.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We embrace new ideas and cutting-edge technologies to deliver better solutions.

teamwork.title: Team spirit
teamwork.description: Collaboration is at the heart of everything, valuing diverse perspectives.

excellence.title: Training

safety.title: Safety first

quotes.engineer: Joining Bontera was the best decision of my career. The projects are demanding, the team is supportive, and there is always room to grow. I had opportunities here I never imagined.
quotes.manager: What I love most about Bontera is the collaborative culture. Everyone, from leadership to new hires, works together toward shared goals. It really feels like a family.
quotes.architect: The scale and complexity of Bontera’s projects are unmatched. I have worked on iconic buildings that will stand for generations. It is incredibly rewarding to see your work shape the skyline.

hero.subtitle: Tell us about your project and receive a detailed, tailored proposal from our team. No commitment, no hidden fees.

form.title: Tell us about your project

privacy.text: By submitting this form, you agree to our

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

success.title: Request sent
success.message: Thank you for your interest in Bontera. Our team will review your request and contact you within 48 hours with a tailored proposal.

error.title: Submission failed
error.message: We could not process your request. Please try again or contact us directly.

contact.title: Prefer to talk
contact.description: Our team is available to discuss your project.

process.title: From request to proposal
process.description: Our streamlined process ensures you receive a complete, accurate quote quickly.

submit.title: Submit your request
submit.description: Fill out our detailed form with your information and needs.

review.title: Analysis & review
review.description: Our experts review your request and analyze project requirements.

consultation.title: Initial consultation
consultation.description: We schedule a call to discuss details and answer your questions.

proposal.title: Receive your proposal
proposal.description: Get a detailed proposal with transparent pricing.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about quotes
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about our quoting process.

stillQuestions.title: Still have questions
stillQuestions.description: Our team is here to help. Contact us for personalized support.

timeline.question: How long does it take to receive a quote
timeline.answer: We generally provide an initial quote within 48 hours after receiving your request. For complex projects requiring a deeper analysis, we will contact you to confirm the timeline.

cost.question: Is the quote paid
cost.answer: No, our quotes are completely free and without obligation. We prioritize transparency so you have all the information you need to decide.

included.question: What does the quote include
included.answer: Our quotes include a cost breakdown, timeline, scope of work, material specifications, and payment terms, as well as information on permits, insurance, and warranty.

changes.question: Can I change the project after receiving the quote
changes.answer: Absolutely. Needs can evolve. We revise quotes based on updated specifications or scope changes, at no additional cost.

testimonial.quote: The quoting process was extremely smooth. The Bontera team took the time to understand our needs and delivered a detailed, transparent proposal that gave us full confidence to move forward.
testimonial.author: Mohammad Al-Farsi

meta.title: Mission & Values | Bontera Construction
meta.description: Discover Bontera’s mission, vision, and core values that guide every project and partnership.

hero.title: Our Mission, Vision & Values
hero.subtitle: The principles that guide every one of our decisions and every project we deliver.

mission.title: Build excellence, create value
mission.description: We develop sustainable, safe, and economically viable solutions for private clients, investors, and businesses. To do so, we combine deep market knowledge, transparent advice, and a strong network of financial and real estate partners.

vision.title: Shape the world of tomorrow
vision.description: To be the global leader in sustainable construction, recognized for turning bold architectural visions into lasting structures that inspire, serve, and stand the test of time.

coreValues.title: The pillars of our success
coreValues.subtitle: These essential values shape our company culture and define how we work with our clients, partners, and each other.

excellence.title: Quality
excellence.description: We pursue quality in every detail, from initial design to final handover, so that our work is a symbol of quality and craftsmanship.

integrity.title: Accountability
integrity.description: We conduct our business with honesty and transparency, building trust through ethical practices.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We adopt the most advanced technologies and methods to deliver smarter and more sustainable construction solutions.

safety.title: Safety
safety.description: The wellbeing of our team and communities is paramount. We apply strict safety standards on every project.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: We are committed to environmentally responsible practices to reduce our impact and create value for future generations.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.description: We believe in strong collaborative relationships, working closely with our clients and stakeholders to achieve shared success.

clientFirst.title: Client first
clientFirst.description: Every decision is guided by what is best for our clients. We listen, understand, and deliver beyond expectations.

qualityDriven.title: Quality standards
qualityDriven.description: We make no compromises on quality. From materials to execution, we meet the highest standards.

teamEmpowerment.title: Empowering teams
teamEmpowerment.description: We invest in our people through training, resources, and development opportunities. Strong teams deliver exceptional results.

continuousImprovement.title: Continuous improvement
continuousImprovement.description: We constantly optimize our processes, adopt new technologies, and evolve to stay ahead of industry trends.

valuesSnapshot.title: What defines Bontera

items.transparencyReliabilityCommitment: Transparency, reliability, and commitment are the foundation of every partnership.
items.technicalExpertise: Technical expertise and rigorous execution ensure world-class delivery.
items.holisticApproach: A holistic approach that brings construction and real estate together under one vision.
items.valueGrowth: Sustainable value creation with controlled risk and long-term growth.

valuesSnapshot.closing: At Bontera, values are not statements, they are standards we apply every day.

culture.title: A standard of work done right
culture.paragraph1: At Bontera, our company culture is built on mutual respect, collaboration, and a shared commitment to excellence.
culture.paragraph2: We celebrate diversity, encourage innovation, and recognize that our greatest strength is our teams
culture.quote: Culture is not just what we do. It is who we are and how we treat each other.

cta.title: Discover the Bontera difference
cta.description: See how our values translate into exceptional outcomes for your project.

meta.title: Partners & Affiliates | Bontera Construction
meta.description: Discover Bontera’s strategic partnerships with leading companies in construction, technology, and materials supply.

hero.title: Building success through partnership
hero.subtitle: We collaborate with industry leaders to deliver exceptional outcomes and drive innovation in construction.

philosophy.title: Stronger together
philosophy.paragraph1: At Bontera, we believe the best projects are built through collaboration. Our strategic partnerships expand our capabilities and enable us to deliver global solutions that exceed client expectations.
philosophy.paragraph2: We carefully select partners who share our commitment to quality, innovation, and sustainability. Together, we combine expertise, resources, and technologies to take on the most demanding construction projects.

strategic.title: Engineering & design partners
strategic.subtitle: World-class engineering and design firms that bring the most ambitious visions to life.

technology.title: Accelerating digital innovation
technology.subtitle: Technology partners that support our digital transformation and enable smarter construction.

suppliers.title: Premium suppliers
suppliers.subtitle: Trusted suppliers providing quality materials that meet our standards of excellence.

associations.title: Industry associations
associations.description: We maintain active memberships with leading professional associations, staying connected to best practices and contributing to the evolution of the industry.

cta.title: Become a partner
cta.description: Want to collaborate with Bontera? We are always looking for organizations that share our commitment to excellence.

privacy.text: I agree to the processing of my personal data in accordance with the

meta.title: Why choose us? | Bontera Construction
meta.description: Bontera is an integrated company that supports clients at every stage of their projects by combining technical expertise, strategic vision, and operational excellence.

hero.title: Why choose us?
hero.subtitle: Bontera, an international partner for your real estate projects

global.title: BONTERA GmbH
global.p1: Bontera is a company that supports clients at every stage of their projects by combining technical expertise, strategic vision, and qualified service delivery. Our approach is built on transparency, reliability, and commitment, with a constant objective: create sustainable value while controlling risk.
global.p2: With deep market knowledge and rigorous project management, Bontera supports individuals, businesses, and investors by providing tailored solutions adapted to every need.

bullets.finish: A high-end finish you can be proud of.

card.title: Premium delivery
card.body: A single standard, applied consistently across the entire project.

integrated.title: An integrated real estate vision
integrated.p1: Combining these areas of expertise enables Bontera to offer a holistic approach covering the entire real estate lifecycle: feasibility, design, construction, management, and commercialization. This integrated vision improves performance, reduces friction, and strengthens risk control.

contractor.title: Bontera - General contractor
contractor.p1: As a general contractor, Bontera provides planning, management, and execution of residential and commercial real estate projects, ensuring quality and compliance with deadlines and standards.
contractor.p2: We also provide construction consulting services for individuals and businesses looking to secure their technical and financial decisions. As a representative of public or private project owners, we act as a single point of contact, defend the client’s interests, coordinate all stakeholders, and ensure transparent tracking throughout the project.

developer.title: Bontera - Project development
developer.p1: Bontera operates as a project developer, supporting the concept and development of residential or commercial real estate projects. We carry out complete feasibility studies covering technical, regulatory, financial, and commercial aspects to secure the investment from the earliest stages.
developer.p2: From design to delivery, we structure and manage projects end-to-end with an approach aimed at maximizing asset value and ensuring long-term profitability and sustainability.

broker.title: Bontera - Real estate broker
broker.p1: As a real estate broker, Bontera supports individuals and investors in their buying, selling, and leasing transactions. Our market knowledge, combined with strong technical and financial expertise, enables us to identify the best opportunities and secure each transaction.
broker.p2: We place transparency and protection of our clients’ interests at the heart of our approach, ensuring informed decisions and optimal results.

cta.imageAlt: Do you have a real estate project?
cta.title: Do you have a real estate project?
cta.description: Bontera is your strategic partner to deliver it successfully.
